title: Positive flow: Complete birthday input and register
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'New User' screen. | Tap on the date picker dialog to select a birthday. | Select a month from the month selection field. | Select a day from the day selection field. | Select a year from the year selection field. | Tap on the 'OK' button to confirm the birthday selection. | Tap on the 'REGISTER' button to complete the registration process.
expected_result: The app should display a confirmation message indicating successful registration. | The user should be redirected to the home screen or the next appropriate screen.

title: Negative flow: Cancel birthday input
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'New User' screen. | Tap on the date picker dialog to select a birthday. | Select a month from the month selection field. | Select a day from the day selection field. | Select a year from the year selection field. | Tap on the 'Cancel' button to cancel the birthday input.
expected_result: The date picker dialog should close without saving the selected birthday.

title: Negative flow: Invalid date selection
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'New User' screen. | Tap on the date picker dialog to select a birthday. | Select an invalid month from the month selection field. | Select a day from the day selection field. | Select a year from the year selection field. | Tap on the 'OK' button to confirm the birthday selection.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating an invalid date selection.

title: Negative flow: Empty birthday input
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'New User' screen. | Tap on the date picker dialog to select a birthday. | Select a month from the month selection field. | Select a day from the day selection field. | Select a year from the year selection field. | Tap on the 'OK' button to confirm the birthday selection.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating that a birthday must be entered.

title: Negative flow: Invalid year selection
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'New User' screen. | Tap on the date picker dialog to select a birthday. | Select a month from the month selection field. | Select a day from the day selection field. | Select an invalid year from the year selection field. | Tap on the 'OK' button to confirm the birthday selection.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating an invalid year selection.

title: Negative flow: Invalid month selection
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'New User' screen. | Tap on the date picker dialog to select a birthday. | Select an invalid month from the month selection field. | Select a day from the day selection field. | Select a year from the year selection field. | Tap on the 'OK' button to confirm the birthday selection.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating an invalid month selection.
